name: multi team player team stats obj 2021
description: OBJ 2021 multi-team: player_nfl_teams shows CLE and LA; team stat resolves to CLE (9 games > LA 8, tie-break not needed)
expected_query: with "tf3958640351d7ab069728109e93765b1" as materialized (select "player_gamelogs_year_2021"."pid", count(*) as "rate_type_total_count", array_agg(distinct player_gamelogs_year_2021.tm) as teams from "player_gamelogs_year_2021" left join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs_year_2021"."esbid" where "player_gamelogs_year_2021"."active" = true and "nfl_games"."nfl_week_id" in ('2021_PRE_WEEK_1', '2021_PRE_WEEK_2', '2021_PRE_WEEK_3', '2021_PRE_WEEK_4', '2021_REG_WEEK_1', '2021_REG_WEEK_2', '2021_REG_WEEK_3', '2021_REG_WEEK_4', '2021_REG_WEEK_5', '2021_REG_WEEK_6', '2021_REG_WEEK_7', '2021_REG_WEEK_8', '2021_REG_WEEK_9', '2021_REG_WEEK_10', '2021_REG_WEEK_11', '2021_REG_WEEK_12', '2021_REG_WEEK_13', '2021_REG_WEEK_14', '2021_REG_WEEK_15', '2021_REG_WEEK_16', '2021_REG_WEEK_17', '2021_REG_WEEK_18', '2021_POST_WEEK_1', '2021_POST_WEEK_2', '2021_POST_WEEK_3', '2021_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_games"."year" in (2021) group by "player_gamelogs_year_2021"."pid"), "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2021_PRE_WEEK_1', '2021_PRE_WEEK_2', '2021_PRE_WEEK_3', '2021_PRE_WEEK_4', '2021_REG_WEEK_1', '2021_REG_WEEK_2', '2021_REG_WEEK_3', '2021_REG_WEEK_4', '2021_REG_WEEK_5', '2021_REG_WEEK_6', '2021_REG_WEEK_7', '2021_REG_WEEK_8', '2021_REG_WEEK_9', '2021_REG_WEEK_10', '2021_REG_WEEK_11', '2021_REG_WEEK_12', '2021_REG_WEEK_13', '2021_REG_WEEK_14', '2021_REG_WEEK_15', '2021_REG_WEEK_16', '2021_REG_WEEK_17', '2021_REG_WEEK_18', '2021_POST_WEEK_1', '2021_POST_WEEK_2', '2021_POST_WEEK_3', '2021_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2021) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2021) group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" as materialized (select "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team", sum(t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays from "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" group by "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" = 'REG' and "nfl_games"."year" in (2021) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2021) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year") select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, tf3958640351d7ab069728109e93765b1.teams as player_nfl_teams_0, "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays" AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "player"."pos" from "player" left join "tf3958640351d7ab069728109e93765b1" on "tf3958640351d7ab069728109e93765b1"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2021 left join "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" on "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player_year_teams"."team" group by player.fname, player.lname, tf3958640351d7ab069728109e93765b1.teams, "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 5 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
